text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In every era, in every corner of the world, there is always one person
who stands head and shoulders above their peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At Tracen Academy, this maxim remains ever constant.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And crossing the finish line in first place, leagues ahead of the
competition, is Symboli Rudolf! What a performance!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew... Victory secured. I'm on the right track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promising new racers are gathered here at the tryouts, eager to prove
themselves to prospective trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But... Symboli Rudolf has won by such an insurmountable lead, her
poor rivals pale in comparison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She even outshadowed her own personal best. The sheer power she
demonstrated left all of us dumbfounded.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To all in the stands, allow me to extend my gratitude. Your cheers of
encouragement led me to this victory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And to you, trainers: did my performance today satisfy your
expectations?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I realize that I still have far to travel in my journey to the top, and I
leave much room for improvement.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I seek a comrade in arms who will march this imperial
path with me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If you share my vision, I implore you to put your name forward.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's easier said than done. She's clearly talented beyond belief,
but...

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... If her trainer is unable to guide her to victory... their
reputation will be shredded.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're not wrong. From a trainer's perspective, taking on a runner
like Symboli Rudolf is a huge risk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, no one can muster the courage to put themselves in the
running, and we all disperse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Steady, now... One last push!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With the homestretch ahead of her, Symboli Rudolf picks up speed,
leaving her competitors lagging behind!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's unstoppable! Her reign is absolute! We're seeing a run worthy of
the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard I try, I can't get Symboli Rudolf's overwhelmingly
powerful strides out of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Needless to say, sleep doesn't come easily to me that night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, I head to the training grounds.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, a trainer... I remember seeing you at the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You were at the race, and now you've come to speak to me directly.
May I presume you're here to scout me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then I've but one question for you: why do you wish to be my trainer?
choice_data_list: I want to see more of your running.
I want to see more of your running.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see. "More of my running," you say. I suppose that means you
see future potential in me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For your reference, you're the third trainer I've had this conversation
with.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The first spoke of his determination to make me stronger. The second
spoke of her commitment to working toward my goal together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Three days from now, I will ask each of you for your reasoning again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like you to provide a concrete example of your plan to me
then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for testing you like this. But I can't make the decision
lightly, you see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am to stand at the absolute zenith, as a guiding light to all
Umamusume. That is the mission I've given myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If I'm to reach such lofty heights, I can't afford to compromise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, then. We will meet again three days hence. I look forward to
your answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as the last words leave her lips, Rudolf looks straight into my
eyes with a calm, composed smile.
